details.test: Task 1: Save recent flu/pandemic checklist for households with children to My Plan
Task 2: Build 3-day emergency supply kit under $150 with at least 15 items
Task 3: Add two closest cooling centers open Saturday afternoon near 94110 to printable list
Task 4: Register for beginner online training under 2 hours within 14 days
Task 5: Add heatwave and second hazard guidance for adults 65+ to My Plan
Task 6: Create family emergency communication plan for 4-person household
Task 7: Subscribe to SMS alerts for wildfire and air quality with quiet hours
Task 8: Add three support resources for parents to My Resources
Task 9: Save two resources to Download Later list
